case_title: ** Transferred to Alameda County ** LILY LIU ET AL VS. MATTEHW LIU ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF FEB-21-2018 CONTINUED TO APR-04-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

DECLARATION OF ROBERT C. MATZ IN SUPPORT OF LILY LIU AND MENG TENG CHUNG'S NOTICE OF UNOPPOSED MOTION AND MOTION TO TRANSFER VENUE FROM SAN FRANCISCO SUPERIOR COURT TO ALAMEDA SUPERIOR COURT TO ENSURE PROPER VENUE AND AVOID DISMISSAL FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT, WHO WILL NOT BE APPEARING AT THE HEARING (TRANSACTION ID # 61977584) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIU, LILY CHUNG, MENG TENG

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-15-2018 CONTINUED TO JUL-03-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAY-15-2018 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST ROBERT MATZ, ESQ. FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: AUG-21-2018, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE SEP-05-2018. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFFS LILY LIU AND MENG TENG CHUNG'S MOTION TO TRANSFER VENUE FROM SAN FRANCISCO SUPERIOR COURT TO ALAMEDA SUPERIOR COURT IS GRANTED. GOOD CAUSE SHOWN. "PLAINTIFFS TO PAY ALL TRANSFER COSTS." ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600 (302/HEK)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF OCT-16-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR. VENUE CHANGED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-26-2018 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-21-2018 Continued To Oct-16-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to OCT-16-2018. Judge: TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-28-2018 Continued To Aug-21-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Lily Liu And Meng Teng Chung'S Notice Of Unopposed Motion And Motion To Transfer Venue From San Francisco Superior Court To Alameda Superior Court To Ensure Proper Venue And Avoid Dismissal For Failure To Serve Defendant Who Will Not Be Appearing At The Hearing
Off Calendar May-23-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

PLAINTIFFS Lily Liu And Meng Teng Chung'S Motion To Transfer Venue From San Francisco Superior Court To Alameda Superior Court is granted. Good cause shown. "Plaintiffs to pay all transfer costs." Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR #8600 =(302/HEK)
